footer.legalNotice: قانونی متن فی الحال نمونہ ہے اور عوامی لانچ سے پہلے منظور شدہ حتمی متن سے بدلنا ضروری ہے۔

buttons.startPlanningFree: منصوبہ بندی شروع کریں — یہ مفت ہے

earlyAccess.message: {appName} ابھی فعال طور پر تیار ہو رہا ہے۔ فیچرز بدل سکتے ہیں اور کچھ چیزیں ابھی مکمل طور پر درست کام نہ کریں۔

cookieBanner.message: ہم {appName} کو مستحکم رکھنے کے لیے ضروری کوکیز اور آپ کے تجربے کو بہتر بنانے کے لیے اختیاری کوکیز استعمال کرتے ہیں۔ ہماری

translationNotice.message: اس صفحے کا ترجمہ حال ہی میں AI کی مدد سے کیا گیا ہے اور اس میں اب بھی ترجمے کی غلطیاں ہو سکتی ہیں۔

contact.title: رابطہ
contact.description: ترجمے کی غلطیوں کی رپورٹ یا لوکلائزیشن فیڈبیک بھیجنے کے لیے یہ صفحہ استعمال کریں۔
contact.formStatusBody: مخصوص فارم ابھی فعال نہیں ہے۔ تب تک براہِ کرم ہمیں ای میل کریں۔
contact.responseNote: ہم عموماً 2–3 کاروباری دنوں میں جواب دیتے ہیں۔

offline.title: You are offline. Changes will be queued.
offline.messageNone: Planner stays usable with cached data.
offline.messageOne: {count} change is queued and will sync after reconnect.
offline.messageMany: {count} changes are queued and will sync after reconnect.

degraded.title: Connection is unstable. Saving in resilient mode.
degraded.messageNone: Planner stays usable while we retry in the background.
degraded.messageOne: {count} queued change will sync when Supabase stabilizes.
degraded.messageMany: {count} queued changes will sync when Supabase stabilizes.

banner.forcedMode: Supabase outage simulation is currently forced in debugger mode.
banner.retryHint: Retrying Supabase connection every 30s while this tab stays open.

offline.messageNone: Offline mode enabled. Trip data is served from local cache.
offline.messageOne: Offline mode enabled. {count} change is queued for sync.
offline.messageMany: Offline mode enabled. {count} changes are queued for sync.

degraded.messageNone: Connection is degraded. Edits are protected with local queue fallback.
degraded.messageOne: Connection is degraded. {count} change is queued for replay.
degraded.messageMany: Connection is degraded. {count} changes are queued for replay.

tripStrip.serverBackup: A newer server version was backed up before replay. You can restore it if needed.
tripStrip.pendingOne: {count} queued change is waiting for replay.
tripStrip.pendingMany: {count} queued changes are waiting for replay.

toast.title: Sync status
toast.serverBackupRestored: Server backup restored for this trip.
toast.syncPartialFailureOne: {count} queued change still failed. You can retry.
toast.syncPartialFailureMany: {count} queued changes still failed. You can retry.

strip.directSinceDate: سفر کا پیش نظارہ {date} سے رکا ہوا ہے۔ مکمل پلاننگ موڈ کھولنے کے لیے ابھی دوبارہ فعال کریں۔
strip.directNoDate: سفر کا پیش نظارہ رکا ہوا ہے۔ مکمل پلاننگ موڈ کھولنے کے لیے ابھی دوبارہ فعال کریں۔
strip.loginSinceDate: سفر کا پیش نظارہ {date} سے رکا ہوا ہے۔ دوبارہ فعال کرنے اور مکمل پلاننگ موڈ کھولنے کے لیے لاگ اِن کریں۔
strip.loginNoDate: سفر کا پیش نظارہ رکا ہوا ہے۔ دوبارہ فعال کرنے اور مکمل پلاننگ موڈ کھولنے کے لیے لاگ اِن کریں۔

overlay.eyebrow: سفر پیش نظارہ رکا ہوا ہے

title.direct: پلاننگ جاری رکھنے کے لیے اس سفر کو دوبارہ فعال کریں
title.login: اس سفر کو دوبارہ فعال کرنے کے لیے لاگ اِن کریں

description.direct: آپ لاگ اِن ہیں۔ ابھی دوبارہ فعال کریں تاکہ ایڈیٹنگ، منزلوں کے نام، اور نقشے کے راستے واپس آجائیں۔
description.login: ایڈیٹنگ، منزلوں کے نام، اور نقشے کے راستے واپس لانے کے لیے لاگ اِن کریں۔

footer.withDate: {date} کو میعاد ختم ہوئی۔ دوبارہ فعال کرنے تک پیش نظارہ موڈ دکھائی دیتا رہے گا۔
footer.noDate: دوبارہ فعال کرنے تک پیش نظارہ موڈ دکھائی دیتا رہے گا۔

actions.login: فعال کرنے کے لیے لاگ اِن کریں

toast.title: سفر دوبارہ فعال ہوگیا
toast.description: مکمل پلاننگ موڈ دوبارہ دستیاب ہے۔

header.titleTooltipEditable: Open trip details and edit the title
header.shareDisabled: Activate this trip to share it

plan.title: Trip
plan.description: Keep the high-level trip context beside the planner.
plan.focusHint: Selected stop details stay in the right-side details panel.
plan.empty: Pick a city, transfer, or activity to edit it in the right-side details panel.

places.title: Places
places.description: See the trip context behind each stop.
places.empty: Pick a city or activity to open destination context.

explore.title: Explore
explore.description: Open quick discovery links for the active city.
explore.empty: Pick a city to explore stays, activities, and events.
explore.focusDescription: Use quick links to keep researching without losing your trip layout.
explore.savedStaysEmpty: No stays are saved for this city yet.

more.title: More
more.description: Open exports, history, and deeper trip controls.
more.historyDescription: Open the full trip panels when you need older versions, diagnostics, or deeper management tools.

workspace.demoHint: Demo content is mocked until live destination services are wired in.

overview.label: Overview
overview.title: Trip overview
overview.description: See your route, next steps, and travel pulse at a glance.

planner.label: Planner
planner.title: Planner workspace
planner.description: Edit the calendar, map, timeline, and selected-stop details in one focused workspace.
planner.hint: This page is fully live. The destination and language pages around it still use Thailand demo content while we wire real data.

bookings.label: Bookings
bookings.title: Bookings
bookings.description: Track reservations, due decisions, and missing logistics in one place.

places.label: Places
places.title: Places
places.description: Open country and city context with neighborhoods, safety notes, and arrival basics.

explore.label: Explore
explore.title: Explore
explore.description: Research activities, stays, and events without losing the trip layout.

phrases.label: Phrases
phrases.title: Phrases
phrases.description: Keep useful translations, pronunciation, and flashcards close to the trip.

notes.label: Notes
notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Capture planning notes, diary stubs, and quick reminders for the route.

photos.label: Photos
photos.title: Photos
photos.description: Preview the future album space for memories, highlights, and recap visuals.

infoDialog.title: Trip details
infoDialog.description: Edit core info, review history, export the trip, and check destination context.

general.editHint: Click into the title to rename the trip or adjust the essentials here.
general.readOnlyHintExample: Example trips stay read-only here. Copy the trip first if you want to rename it or save it as a favorite.
general.readOnlyHintShared: This shared trip is read-only. You can review the details here, but editing is disabled.
general.sourceSharedDescription: This itinerary was copied from a shared trip snapshot.
general.sourceTripDescription: This itinerary was copied from another trip in your workspace.

history.example: Example trips do not save history snapshots. Copy this trip first if you want to keep edits and revisit them later.
history.pendingSyncOne: 1 latest change is saved locally and not synced yet.
history.pendingSyncMany: {count} latest changes are saved locally and not synced yet.
history.failedSyncOne: 1 queued change still failed to sync. Retry sync to publish it.
history.failedSyncMany: {count} queued changes still failed to sync. Retry sync to publish them.

activities.title: Activities calendar
activities.description: Export planned activities as an .ics file so you can drop them into your calendar app.

cities.title: Cities calendar
cities.description: Create a cleaner trip skeleton with city arrivals and stays only.

everything.title: Complete calendar bundle
everything.description: Download one calendar file with cities, transfers, and activities together.

print.title: Print layout
print.description: Open a print-friendly version of this trip for PDFs, handouts, or trip briefings.

destination.locked: Destination details unlock once this trip is activated.
destination.empty: No destination information is available for this trip yet.
destination.futureChecksDescription: This tab is ready for more trip-specific guidance as we add richer destination data.
